title: Vuln Intel Fusion + Security Scorecard — EPSS/KEV-Driven Grade Computation
description: test_vuln_intel_fusion_engine.py, test_security_scorecard_engine.py, and test_security_posture_benchmarking_engine.py cluster together. The scorecard computes A-F grades. The vuln intel fusion merges CVSS/EPSS/KEV from multiple sources. Gap: scorecard grade is computed from static control weights but does not factor in live EPSS scores from vuln_intel_fusion, so a KEV-listed critical vuln does not immediately drop the org grade.
missing: Live KEV/EPSS → scorecard impact: when vuln_intel_fusion detects a KEV finding, automatically deduct points from the relevant scorecard domain
Grade change webhook: when an org's scorecard grade drops by a letter, fire a notification to CISO email and Slack channel with the delta and top drivers
Peer benchmark comparison: /api/v1/scorecard/benchmark that shows where this org's grade ranks against anonymized peers in the same industry vertical
